title: 11119_The_Value_of_Prediction_in_Identifying_the_Worst-Off
positive_examples: Helps public agencies allocate limited resources more effectively to target the most vulnerable populations.
Encourages the incorporation of fairness, transparency, and accountability measures in predictive modeling.
negative_examples: Formalizing complex institutional processes may omit important real-world details, risking biases or misalignments.
Small design changes in resource-constrained contexts can disproportionately affect marginalized communities.
